overall.description: Game engine footage depicting first-person exploration of a narrow rocky canyon containing a river. The camera moves steadily through shallow water and onto the rocky shoreline, flanked by steep canyon walls under a clear blue sky. The high-fidelity rendering suggests Unreal Engine 5 or similar modern game engine technology.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through shallow canyon water between towering rock walls

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock textures
sunlit rocky cliff with visible stratification and sparse vegetation
calm reflective water surface filling the canyon floor
narrow opening between canyon walls showing distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving through a narrow canyon river. Steep rocky walls rise on both sides while calm water reflects the clear sky above. The camera advances steadily through the shallow water toward a distant opening in the canyon.

events.description: camera exits the water and transitions onto the rocky shoreline on the right side of the canyon

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky canyon shore having exited the water, continuing forward exploration

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from water to the rocky canyon shore around the 45-second mark. Now walking on dry gravel terrain, the water remains visible to the left while the path continues forward between the imposing canyon walls. The lighting remains consistent with direct sunlight illuminating the right cliff face.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a narrow rocky canyon that transitions from a river crossing to a trek along the shoreline. It begins by advancing steadily through shallow, calm water that reflects the clear blue sky, flanked by steep walls on both sides. As the camera moves toward a distant opening in the canyon, the path shifts from the riverbed onto the dry gravel of the rocky shore. The scene then continues forward with the water remaining to the left, while direct sunlight illuminates the imposing cliff face on the right.
